title: First Cascading Call selected projects announced
content: ECHOES is thrilled to introduce the 12 projects that have been awarded funding by the first Cascading Call for contributions of data to the Cultural Heritage Cloud.
snippet: ECHOES is thrilled to introduce the 12 projects that have been awarded funding by the first Cascading Call for contributions of data to the Cultural Heritage Cloud.
creator: Sheena_B
sourceDescription: European Cloud for Heritage OpEn Science

title: Call for Papers: 23rd EUROGRAPHICS Workshop on Graphics and Cultural Heritage (GCH 2026)
content:
GCH 2026 has opened its Call for Papers which includes a special track on the ECCCH, “Visual Computing in the Context of the European Collaborative Cloud for Cultural Heritage”.

We are pleased to invite you to contribute to the 23rd EUROGRAPHICS Workshop on Graphics and Cultural Heritage (GCH 2026).

creator: Sheena_B
sourceDescription: European Cloud for Heritage OpEn Science

title: A Day with TEXTaiLES with Hackathon-like event
content: TextAIles are organising a one-day public event on the 3rd June as part of Oulu Cultural Capital 2026, Finland, as the University of Oulu is a member of their consortium. Open to everyone, from researchers and heritage professionals to students and curious members of the public, this is a unique opportunity to explore how cutting-edge artificial intelligence and digital tools are revolutionising the way we study, preserve, and understand textile cultural heritage.

title: MusicSphere: User Needs and Requirements Survey
content: MusicSphere is currently in the phase of identifying user requirements and analysing the needs of the community. At this stage of the project, our objective is to better understand the expectations, challenges, and real practices of professionals working with cultural, musical and sound heritage of historic pipe organs.

title: COLOURS Workshop: Shaping the future of digital practices in Conservation-Restoration
content: What if you could virtually test a restoration strategy before touching a single artwork? On the 12th May 2026, COLOURS is bringing this possibility — and much more — to conservators-restorers gathered in Ljubljana for a hands-on workshop attached to the General Assembly of E.C.C.O.

creator: Sheena_B
sourceDescription: European Cloud for Heritage OpEn Science

title: ECHOLOT Kick-off and Consortium Meetings
content: Although the ECHOLOT project has only been operational for a few months, it has already held two plenary meetings, demonstrating strong engagement and enthusiasm for shaping the future of cultural heritage data in Europe.

title: INFINITY Project surveys on CH collections practices
content: Do you manage or reuse cultural heritage collections in your work? Then take one of our INFINITY project surveys to share your perspectives and contribute to the future of the digital creative economy. It will take 10 – 15 minutes to complete and the deadline for submissions is 30 April 2026.
snippet: Do you manage or reuse cultural heritage collections in your work? Then take one of our INFINITY project surveys to share your perspectives and contribute to the future of the digital creative economy

title: INP Focus Group for curators, art historians and conservator-restorers
content: At the end of March the INP hosted a focus group organised by the ECHOES project, bringing together curators, art historians, and conservator-restorers. The event gathered heritage professionals and researchers from across Europe.

title: Round up from ECHOES in Poznań, Poland
content:
The 2nd Annual ECHOES meeting in Poznań buzzed with activity and excitement for the week 16th-20th March with a packed agenda for project members. Days 1-2 consisted of ECHOES internal meetings to present and discuss the project progress and results and to plan for the upcoming months. On Day 3, the morning involved the sister projects and the afternoon opened up ECHOES to all stakeholders at a Public Event. Day 4 involved the Advisory Boards and Sister projects with Day 5 rounding up the week with internal project meetings.

A
